description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the user initiates Fast Forward
AND presses the "back" button on the controller after a few moments
steps.result:
THEN Fast Forward stops
AND playback resumes at the point where Fast Forward was initiated
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
